concerns.text: CompositeComplexityScore entity defined in data-model.md but no corresponding contract schema exists in contracts/. Data model defines fields (score_id, weight_crossing, weight_braid, per_knot_scores, correlation_pearson, correlation_spearman, effect_size_r, p_value) without a JSON schema for validation. Breaks data-model ↔ contracts alignment requirement.
Plan does not explicitly reference which contract schemas govern which data flows. Should add contract references to data model section to establish plan ↔ contracts alignment.

Constitution Principle V (Versioning Discipline) requires state file updates but plan doesn't specify exact path (state/projects/PROJ-552-quantifying-the-complexity-of-knot-diagr.yaml per constitution.md).

Deprecated schemas (knot_data.schema.yaml, regression_result.schema.yaml) exist alongside active ones but plan doesn't indicate which schemas to use for implementation. Should document schema versioning strategy.
is_alternating field defined as boolean in data-model.md but contracts/knot_record.schema.yaml defines it as ["boolean", "null"]. Should be consistent across documents.
